session_summary:
## i18n Cartography Results

Completed a comprehensive read-only analysis of the OpenCode Desktop i18n system across all locale files and the @solid-primitives/i18n library.

### Key Findings

**1. Architecture**: The app uses @solid-primitives/i18n v2.2.1 with flat dot-notation dictionaries (963 keys in en.ts + 152 from UI package). The translator is created via `i18n.translator(() => dict, i18n.resolveTemplate)` in the LanguageProvider context. Dictionaries are lazy-loaded per locale and cached.

**2. Locale Coverage**: All 17 non-English locales have incomplete translations. French leads at 92.5% (891/963 keys), while Traditional Chinese lags at 88.2% (850/963 keys).

**3. Critical Gap Zones**:
- **dialog.agents** (18 keys) and **dialog.mcp** (19 keys) are entirely untranslated in every single locale
- **github.** (13 keys) completely untranslated across all locales
- **home.** (18 of 21 keys) untranslated in 16/17 locales
- **settings.general.row.** (21 keys — new UI settings) untranslated in 16/17 locales

**4. Library API**: @solid-primitives/i18n exports flatten (nested→flat dict), resolveTemplate ({{ }} interpolation), translator (reactive lookup), scopedTranslator (prefix scoping), chainedTranslator/proxyTranslator (object-style access), and prefix/template helpers.

**5. Test Coverage**: Only 1 parity test exists, checking exactly 2 specific session keys. No comprehensive translation completeness tests.

**6. Artifact produced**: docs/json/opencode/i18n-cartography-v1.json
next_steps: Potential next steps could include: (1) Adding comprehensive translation parity tests, (2) Filling the universally missing key groups (dialog.agents, dialog.mcp, github, settings.general.row, home.*), (3) Creating a translation management script to auto-detect missing keys, (4) Considering a TMS integration for community translations.

findings.summary: en.ts is the source-of-truth locale with 963 flat dot-notation keys across 28 top-level groups

findings.source: node analysis of all locale files
findings.summary: All 17 non-English locales are missing keys vs en.ts; ranging from 89 missing (zh) to 115 missing (bs, da, no, th, tr, zht). French (fr) is most complete with 891 keys; Traditional Chinese (zht) is least complete with 850 keys.
@solid-primitives/i18n v2.2.1 exports flatten(), resolveTemplate(), translator(), scopedTranslator(), chainedTranslator(), proxyTranslator(), prefix(), template()
App creates translator via i18n.translator(() => flatDict, i18n.resolveTemplate) in LanguageProvider context, merges app + UI dictionaries
UI package adds 152 keys under 'ui.' and 'dialog.usageExceeded.' prefixes
